dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The city of Neo-Seoul hummed with a restless energy, a constant symphony of ambition and anxiety. For most, it was just home. For me, it was a cage.

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: Another day. Another year of trying to blend in. Of pretending I don't feel… this.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLATTER

dialogue.speaker: MIN-JI
dialogue.line: Jae-hyun! You okay? You almost dropped your tray again.

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN
dialogue.line: Ah, Min-ji. Yeah, just… lost in thought.

dialogue.speaker: MIN-JI
dialogue.line: You're always lost in thought. What's on your mind today? The upcoming history exam? Or that new 'Awakened' incident downtown?

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: The Awakened. They're everywhere now. People with powers, heroes, villains… I just want to be normal.

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN
dialogue.line: Just… the usual. Nothing exciting.

dialogue.speaker: MIN-JI
dialogue.line: Well, try to focus. Mr. Kim's pop quiz is no joke.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUMBLE (distant)

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: That tremor… it's not normal. Not for a city this stable.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRASH (closer, louder)

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT 1
dialogue.line: What was that?!

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT 2
dialogue.line: It sounded like it came from the street!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCREAMS (outside)

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: The tingling… it's back. Stronger this time. Like my blood is boiling.

dialogue.speaker: TEACHER
dialogue.line: Everyone, stay calm! Stay inside!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: EXPLOSION (shaking the building)

dialogue.speaker: MIN-JI
dialogue.line: The windows! They're cracking!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A monstrous figure, cloaked in jagged shadows, hovered outside, tearing chunks from the adjacent building. Debris rained down, threatening to shatter the classroom's reinforced glass.

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: No. Not here. Not Min-ji. Not them.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHATTER (glass beginning to give)

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN
dialogue.line: GET DOWN!

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: My hands… they moved on their own. A warmth, then a searing heat. A light.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! (intense, golden energy)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: From Jae-hyun's outstretched palms, a blinding, golden energy shield erupted, slamming into the incoming debris and deflecting it with impossible force.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE (energy dissipating)

dialogue.speaker: MIN-JI
dialogue.line: J-Jae-hyun? What was that…?

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: My entire body aches, but… it worked. I did that. This isn't just a tingling anymore. This is… real.

dialogue.speaker: ROGUE AWAKENED
dialogue.line: Hmph. A new nuisance? You think a little light can stop me?!

dialogue.speaker: JAE-HYUN (thought)
dialogue.line: The 'Golden Child'… that old legend my grandmother used to whisper about. It can't be… can it?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP (Jae-hyun's racing heartbeat)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As the monstrous Awakened prepared another attack, Jae-hyun stared at his hands, a golden aura still faintly shimmering around them. His life of blending in was over. His true nature had just been violently awakened.

summary: Jae-hyun, a seemingly ordinary high school student, struggles with a mysterious inner sensation. During a sudden attack by a rogue 'Awakened' villain, his hidden powers manifest as a golden energy shield, saving his classmates and revealing his true, extraordinary nature.
